headline: Retire on Dividends Alone: The Super-High-Yield Stocks Boomers Are Buying and Never Selling
summary: Some retirees are stacking five specific stocks into permanent positions and expecting the quarterly checks to outlast every market cycle. The yields look almost too good to be real, but the coverage ratios and raise streaks tell a different story.

raw.headline: Retire on Dividends Alone: The Super-High-Yield Stocks Boomers Are Buying and Never Selling
raw.summary: Some retirees are stacking five specific stocks into permanent positions and expecting the quarterly checks to outlast every market cycle. The yields look almost too good to be real, but the coverage ratios and raise streaks tell a different story.
